info.title: Short Code and Short Code Campaign Provisioning
info.description: APIs to provision short codes for messaging.

get.description: Retrieves all the short codes registered with an account.
Retrieves a complete history of all updates associated with an account's registration of a short code for a single country.
Retrieve the details of an account's registration of a short code for a single country.

patch.description: Update (field by field) an account's short code registration for a country. This utilizes [Json Patch](https://jsonpatch.com/).
patch.summary: Update the lease information of an account's short code registration for a country.

get.description: Retrieve all short code campaigns associated with an account.
get.summary: Retrieve all short code campaigns associated with an account.

post.description: Create a new short code campaign for an account.
post.summary: Create a new short code campaign for an account.

get.description: Retrieve the full history of a short code campaign associated with an account. Optionally, use the version query parameter to retriever the history for only a specific version of the campaign.
get.summary: Retrieve the history of a short code campaign associated with an account.

get.description: Retrieve a single short code campaign associated with an account.
get.summary: Retrieve a single short code campaign associated with an account.

put.description: Update a short code campaign associated with an account.
put.summary: Update a short code campaign associated with an account.

post.description: Upload a document associated with a short code campaign. Max file size is 10MB.

get.description: Get a document associated with a short code campaign
Get all webhook subscriptions for short code campaigns on an account.
get.summary: Get all webhook subscriptions for short code campaigns on an account.

post.description: Create a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.
post.summary: Create a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.

put.description: Update a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.
put.summary: Update a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.

delete.description: Delete a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.
delete.summary: Delete a webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.

post.description: Unique webhook URL provided by customers to which Bandwidth sends a POST request to notify customer regarding short code campaign updates.

parameters.description: 64-character lowercase hexidecimal HMAC calculated with a shared secret key, the canonicalized request body, and SHA256. It is only included when a shared secret key is set through webhook subscription.
parameters.name: x-bandwidth-signature-hmac-sha256

post.summary: Short code campaign updates sent to customer's webhook URL.

Basic.description: Basic authentication is a simple authentication scheme built into the HTTP protocol. To use it, send your  HTTP requests with an Authorization header that contains the word Basic followed by a space and a base64-encoded string `username:password`. Example: `Authorization: Basic ZGVtbZpwQDU1dzByZA==`.

shortCode400.description: Bad request, can not process the request.

value.description: Client is providing incorrect or invalid credentials.

shortCode401.description: Client is providing incorrect or invalid credentials.

value.description: Client does not have access rights to the content.

shortCode403.description: Client is providing incorrect or invalid credentials.

shortCode404.description: The short code details not have been found.

value.description: The server has encountered an internal error.

shortCode500.description: The server has encountered an internal error.

shortCodeGetAllShortCodesByAccountRespon.description: Successful response with a paginated list of short codes.

shortCodeGetShortCodeByAccountIdCountryA.description: The short code details have been successfully retrieved and displayed.

shortCodeGetShortCodeHistoryAccountIdCou.description: The short code number history details have been successfully retrieved and displayed.

campaignIdPathParam.name: campaignId
campaignIdPathParam.description: The path parameter for the unique identifier of the campaign.

campaignVersionQueryParam.name: version
campaignVersionQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the version of the campaign. This filters the short code campaign histories by the version.

countryCodeQueryParam.name: countryCode
countryCodeQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the country code of the short code. This is used to sort and filter the short code campaigns by country code.

customerProfileIdQueryParam.name: customerProfileId
customerProfileIdQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the unique identifier of the customer profile. This is used to sort and filter the short code campaigns by the customer profile.

customerProfileNameQueryParam.name: customerProfileName
customerProfileNameQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the name of the customer profile. This is used to sort and filter the short code campaigns by the customer profile.

resultsLimitQueryParam.name: limit
resultsLimitQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the number of results to return. This limits the number of short code campaigns returned.

resultsOffsetQueryParam.name: offset
resultsOffsetQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the number of results to skip. This skips the number of short code campaigns returned.

shortCodeLimitQueryParam.description: The number of entities to return based in the offset.
shortCodeLimitQueryParam.name: limit

shortCodeOffsetQueryParam.description: The offset number of the results to return.
shortCodeOffsetQueryParam.name: offset

shortCodePathParam.description: The short code number used in the request.
shortCodePathParam.name: shortCode

shortCodePhoneNumberQueryParam.name: shortCodePhoneNumber
shortCodePhoneNumberQueryParam.description: The query parameter for the short code. This is used to sort and filter the short code campaigns by the short code.

adminFeedbackRequest.description: Admin-only endpoint to provide feedback on a short code campaign. This will not change the state of a campaign.

adminUpdateCampaignRequest.description: Admin-only endpoint to update a Short Code campaign request. This may be used to assign a short code to a campaign or update the state of a campaign.

campaignDocument.description: Document for a short code campaign.

file.contentType: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/jpg, image/png, application/msword, application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document, text/csv

campaignUpdateWebhookRequest.description: This webhook will be sent out when a campaign status is updated, a short code is assigned to a campaign, or there is an update from the carrier on the status of a campaign. A failure webhook will be sent if any internal error occurs.

createCampaignRequest.description: The request body for creating a new short code campaign.

createShortCodeCampaignWebhookSubscripti.description: The request body for creating a new webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.

updateCampaignRequest.description: The request body for updating a short code campaign.

updateShortCodeCampaignWebhookSubscripti.description: The request body for updating an existing webhook subscription for short code campaigns on an account.

adminFeedbackRequestSchema.description: The request body for providing feedback on a short code campaign.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

adminUpdateCampaignSchema.description: The details of the updated short code campaign.

adminUpdateCampaignRequestSchema.description: Fields that can be updated by an admin for a short code campaign.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

billingType.description: The billing type of the short code. Either standard SMS or free to end user.

callToActionSample.description: A sample of the call to action message that the short code uses.

callToActionType.description: The type of call to action that the short code uses.

callToActionTypeEnum.description: The type of call to action that the short code uses.

campaignId.description: The unique identifier of the short code campaign.

campaignDocumentId.description: The unique id for the document

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

campaignStatus.description: The status of the short code campaign.

campaignUpdateWebhookSchema.description: This webhook may be sent out when a campaign status is updated, a short code is assigned to a campaign, or there is an update from the carrier on the status of a campaign.

carrierStatus.description: List of objects each providing the short code registration status for an individual carrier.

comment.description: The feedback comment for the short code campaign provided by a Bandwidth reviewer.
comment.example: We dont think you are a legit company, prove it!

countryCodeA3.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where this short code campaign sends messages.
countryCodeA3.title: Country Code

createdOn.description: The date and time the short code campaign was created.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

customerProfileId.description: The unique identifier of the customer profile associated with this short code campaign.

customerProfileName.description: The name of the customer profile associated with this short code campaign.

customerProvidedShortCode.description: The customer provided short code to be used for this campaign (short code must be provisioned into the account first by a BW admin).

customerSupportEmail.description: The email address for customer support.

customerSupportPhoneNumber.description: The E164 format phone number for customer support.

customerSupportUrl.description: The URL for the customer support page.

doubleOptInMessage.description: The message that is sent to the customer to confirm that they have opted in to receive messages from the short code.
doubleOptInMessage.example: Reply Y to confirm that you would like to receive messages from us.

estimatedDailyVolumeMms.description: The estimated daily volume of MMS messages that the short code will send.

estimatedDailyVolumeSms.description: The estimated daily volume of SMS messages that the short code will send.

exampleAdvertisementAttachmentUrl.description: The URL for an example advertisement attachment that the short code uses.

exampleAdvertisementUrl.description: The URL for an example advertisement that the short code uses.

exampleAlertMessage.description: An example alert message that the short code uses.
exampleAlertMessage.example: Hello John Doe! Dont miss out on the amazing discounts we have for you. Visit https://test.com/someId to get your discount. STOP to opt out

exampleSecondAlertMessage.description: Another example alert message that the short code uses.
exampleSecondAlertMessage.example: Hello John Doe! We noticed there were some items left in your shopping cart. Please visit https://test.com/someId to finish shopping. STOP to opt out

carrierStatus.description: List of objects each providing the short code registration status for an individual carrier.
List of objects each providing the short code registration status for an individual carrier.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.
The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.
The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

deleted.description: Whether the short code campaign has been deleted.

feedback.description: The feedback provided for the short code campaign by a Bandwidth reviewer.

helpMessage.description: The message that is sent to the customer to provide help information.
helpMessage.example: Thanks for reaching out. Contact us at questions@test.com for support.

isAdultContent.description: A boolean value that indicates if the short code is used for adult or 18+ content.

isMigratedShortCode.description: Is the short code migrated from another provider?

from.description: Used when the operation is copy or move.

value.description: Used when the operation is add, replace, or test.

keywords.description: The keywords that the short code uses separated by spaces.

lastUpdatedOn.description: The date and time the short code campaign was last updated.

leaseReceiptAttachmentUrl.description: The attachment URL for the lease receipt. Required unless isSelfOwned is false and isMigratedShortCode is false.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

messageSenderUrl.description: The URL for the message sender.

messageType.description: The type of message that the short code is used for. Either SMS only or SMS and MMS.

migrationLetterAttachmentUrl.description: The URL for the migration letter attachment.

operationDescription.description: User-friendly description of an operation that occured.

optInConfirmationMessage.description: The message that is sent to the customer to confirm that they have opted in to receive messages from the short code.
optInConfirmationMessage.example: You have successfully opted in to receive messages from us.

optInExplanation.description: The explanation of the opt in conditions for the short code.
optInExplanation.example: By opting in, you agree to receive messages from us.

optInType.description: The type of opt-in methods that the short code uses. For "other", the optInTypeOther field is required.

optInTypeEnum.description: The type of opt-in methods that the short code uses.

optInTypeOther.description: The type of opt-in method that the short code uses if the optInType is "OTHER".
optInTypeOther.example: My opt-in type is not represented in the dropdown.

optOutExplanation.description: The explanation of the opt out conditions for the short code.
optOutExplanation.example: To opt out, reply STOP to this message.

optOutMessage.description: The message that is sent to the customer to confirm that they have opted out of receiving messages from the short code.
optOutMessage.example: You have successfully opted out of receiving messages from us.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: The URL for the SMS privacy policy.

programDescription.description: A description of the program or purpose that the short code is used for.
programDescription.example: This program is designed to provide alerts to customers.

programType.description: The type of program or purpose that the short code is used for.

carrierStatuses.description: List of objects each providing the registration status for an individual carrier.

country.description: The country the short code is registered in.

customerManagedLease.description: Flag indicating whether the customer is managing the short code lease.

status.description: If at least one carrier status is ACTIVE or PENDING, the status will be ACTIVE. If all carrier statues are INACTIVE, the status will be INACTIVE.

version.description: An internal field that represents the current version of the short code data.

shortCodeApiPage.description: Pagination object that represents the current page of short code numbers.

shortCodeCampaignWebhookSubscriptionSche.description: The request body for creating a webhook subscription for a short code campaign.

shortCodeCarrierInfo.description: The registration status for each carrier.

activatedDate.description: The date the short code was activated for this carrier, this date only will be defined when the status of the carrier becomes ACTIVE.

modifiedDate.description: The date the status was modified for this carrier

carrierId.description: Carrier identifier  (possible values ATT, TMOBILE, VERIZON).

shortCodeCarrierData.description: The registration status for each carrier.

carrierId.description: Carrier identifier  (possible values ATT, TMOBILE, VERIZON).

shortCodeCarrierProvisioningInfo.description: Internal field, list of carrier to provider mappings (direct binds).

shortCodeContactEmail.description: The email address of the contact for the short code lease. Required when isSelfOwned is false.

country.description: The country the short code is registered in.

status.description: If at least one carrier status is ACTIVE or PENDING, the status will be ACTIVE. If all carrier statues are INACTIVE, the status will be INACTIVE.

customerManagedLease.description: Flag indicating whether the customer is managing the short code lease.

carrierStatuses.description: List of objects each providing the registration status for an individual carrier.

version.description: A field that represents the version of the short code data, when updating a short code is necessary to supply the last version value added by 1.

status.description: If at least one carrier status is ACTIVE or PENDING, the status will be ACTIVE. If all carrier statues are INACTIVE, the status will be INACTIVE.

customerManagedLease.description: Flag indicating whether the customer is managing the short code lease.

carrierStatuses.description: List of objects each providing the registration status for an individual carrier.

version.description: A field that represents the version of the short code data, when updating a short code is necessary to supply the last version value added by 1.

shortCodeError400.description: A specific error object for HTTP Status 400.

shortCodeHistory.description: Short code history details representation, each history element represents an operation or an event that changed the state of the short code.

country.description: The country the short code was registered in.

operation.description: Operation executed over the short code.

user.description: The customer user ID that initiated the operation.

status.description: If at least one carrier status is ACTIVE or PENDING, the status will be ACTIVE. If all carrier statues are INACTIVE, the status will be INACTIVE.

customerManagedLease.description: Flag indicating whether the customer is managing the short code lease.

carrierStatuses.description: List of objects each providing the registration status for each carrier at the time the event occurred.

version.description: An internal field that represents the version of the short code data.

shortCodeHistoryApiPage.description: Pagination object that represents the current page of short code number history.

example.description: Client is providing incorrect or invalid credentials.

shortCodeLeaseData.description: The lease information for the short code number. This information only applies to Bandwidth managed short code leases (customerManagedLease set to false).

autoRenew.description: Flag indicating whether the lease should auto-renew.

autoRenewMonths.description: The number of months for which to renew the release when it auto renews. Valid values are 3, 6, and 12. The default value, if not supplied on creation, will be 3.

contactEmail.description: Email address used for all lease renewal notifications.

endDate.description: Lease end date. This date is inclusive, e.g. 2022-02-15 means that the short code is valid through 2/15.

startDate.description: Lease start date. This date is inclusive, e.g. 2022-02-07 means that the short code is valid on 2/7.

shortCodeLeaseInfo.description: The lease information for the short code number. This information only applies to Bandwidth managed short code leases (customerManagedLease set to false).

startDate.description: Lease start date. This date is inclusive, e.g. 2022-02-07 means that the short code is valid on 2/7.

endDate.description: Lease end date. This date is inclusive, e.g. 2022-02-15 means that the short code is valid through 2/15.

contactEmail.description: Email address used for all lease renewal notifications.

autoRenew.description: Flag indicating whether the lease should auto-renew.

autoRenewMonths.description: The number of months for which to renew the release when it auto renews. Valid values are 3, 6, and 12. The default value, if not supplied on creation, will be 3.

shortCodeLeaseLength.description: The length of the short code lease. Required when isSelfOwned is false.

shortCodePage.description: Pagination object that represents the current page.

pageNumber.description: The current page used in the request.

pageSize.description: The current page size used in the request.

totalElements.description: The total of objects that could be paginated.

totalPages.description: The total of pages that could be paginated.

shortCodePhoneNumber.description: The short code phone number associated with this campaign. This field may be an empty string if the campaign is not yet associated with a short code.

shortCodeType.description: Is the short code a vanity short code? Required when a customerProvidedShortCode is present.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time this object was created in ISO 8601 format

modifiedDateTime.description: The date and time this object was modified in ISO 8601 format

callbackBasicAuthentication.description: Basic authentication credentials are not required, but if present, both username and password must be provided.

password.description: The password that is used by Bandwidth for basic authentication on callbacks.

username.description: The username that is used by Bandwidth for basic authentication on callbacks.

callbackUrl.description: The URL that the webhook subscription will send messages to.

sharedSecretKey.description: An ASCII string submitted by the user as a shared secret key for generating an HMAC header for callbacks.

webhookSubscriptionId.description: The ID of the webhook subscription that is associated with a callback URL.

limit.description: The number of results to return.

offset.description: The number of results to skip.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

postShortCodeCampaignDocumentSchema.description: The response body for uploading a document for a short code campaign.

termsAndConditionsAttachmentUrl.description: The attachment URL for the SMS terms and conditions.

termsAndConditionsUrl.description: The URL for the terms and conditions.

brandTypeEnum.description: The type of brand that is applying for the short code campaign.

legalEntityTypeEnum.description: The type of legal entity that is applying for the short code campaign.

organizationName.description: The name of the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

registrationCountryCodeA3.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the applying organization is legally registered.

stockMarketSymbol.description: The stock market symbol for the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

federalTaxId.description: The federal tax ID for the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

dunsNumber.description: The 9-digit Dun & Bradstreet number, with or without dashes, for the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

giinNumber.description: The Global Intermediary Identification Number for the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

legalEntityId.description: The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) of the organization that is applying for the short code campaign.

subsidiariesAndLegalAffiliates.description: Free-form text list of subsidiaries and legal affiliates for the organization that is applying for the short code campaign - no enforced constraints beyond string length.

errors.description: The errors array will always be empty for successful responses.

userName.description: The signum username of the user.

version.description: The version of the short code campaign. This gets incremented every time the campaign is edited.
